revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:熱田神宮, en:Atsuta Shrine); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/59047796 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 画像提供依頼 == *旧国宝の鎮皇門[http://page.freett.com/yopi/goisyu/i-pages/i-chinko.html]と海上門[http://network2010.org/article/117]の画像提供を依頼をお願いいたします。--[[利用者:Norio-abc|Norio-abc]]（[[利用者‐会話:Norio-abc|会話]]） 2016年3月22日 (火) 04:43 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1205471056 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=B|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|shinto=yes}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Architecture|importance=needed}} }} == National Treasure of Japan??? == In relation to the edit of [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Atsuta_Shrine&action=historysubmit&diff=328431355&oldid=328387921]. In '''Atsuta Shrine''', there is no national treasure building (real estate) at all. '''Atsuta Shrine''' is not included in the number of the list that exists in [[National Treasures of Japan]] and list that exists in [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)]].--[[User:663highland|663highland]] ([[User talk:663highland|talk]]) 06:40, 29 November 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:6|one external link|6 external links}} on [[Atsuta Shrine]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=745426385 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20060614201723/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080429021401/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/intro/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/intro/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080426025815/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/pre/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/pre/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080504044812/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/tre/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/tre/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20090427132012/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/fes/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/fes/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20060614201723/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/index.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 02:04, 21 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/59047796 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 画像提供依頼 == *旧国宝の鎮皇門[http://page.freett.com/yopi/goisyu/i-pages/i-chinko.html]と海上門[http://network2010.org/article/117]の画像提供を依頼をお願いいたします。--[[利用者:Norio-abc|Norio-abc]]（[[利用者‐会話:Norio-abc|会話]]） 2016年3月22日 (火) 04:43 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1205471056 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=B|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|shinto=yes}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Architecture|importance=needed}} }} == National Treasure of Japan??? == In relation to the edit of [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Atsuta_Shrine&action=historysubmit&diff=328431355&oldid=328387921]. In '''Atsuta Shrine''', there is no national treasure building (real estate) at all. '''Atsuta Shrine''' is not included in the number of the list that exists in [[National Treasures of Japan]] and list that exists in [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)]].--[[User:663highland|663highland]] ([[User talk:663highland|talk]]) 06:40, 29 November 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:6|one external link|6 external links}} on [[Atsuta Shrine]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=745426385 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20060614201723/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080429021401/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/intro/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/intro/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080426025815/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/pre/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/pre/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080504044812/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/tre/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/tre/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20090427132012/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/fes/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/fes/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20060614201723/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/index.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 02:04, 21 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q482065]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:22, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

In '''Atsuta Shrine''', there is no national treasure building (real estate) at all. '''Atsuta Shrine''' is not included in the number of the list that exists in [[National Treasures of Japan]] and list that exists in [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)]].--[[User:663highland|663highland]] ([[User talk:663highland|talk]]) 06:40, 29 November 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:6|one external link|6 external links}} on [[Atsuta Shrine]]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20060614201723/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080429021401/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/intro/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/intro/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080426025815/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/pre/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/pre/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080504044812/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/tre/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/tre/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20090427132012/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/fes/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/fes/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20060614201723/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/index.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 02:04, 21 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q482065]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:22, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Atsuta_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/59047796 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 画像提供依頼 == *旧国宝の鎮皇門[http://page.freett.com/yopi/goisyu/i-pages/i-chinko.html]と海上門[http://network2010.org/article/117]の画像提供を依頼をお願いいたします。--[[User:Norio-abc|Norio-abc]]（[[利用者‐会話:Norio-abc|会話]]） 2016年3月22日 (火) 04:43 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1205471056 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=B|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|shinto=yes}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Architecture|importance=needed}} }} == National Treasure of Japan??? == In relation to the edit of [http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Atsuta_Shrine&action=historysubmit&diff=328431355&oldid=328387921]. In '''Atsuta Shrine''', there is no national treasure building (real estate) at all. '''Atsuta Shrine''' is not included in the number of the list that exists in [[National Treasures of Japan]] and list that exists in [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)]].--[[User:663highland|663highland]] ([[User talk:663highland|talk]]) 06:40, 29 November 2009 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:6|one external link|6 external links}} on [[Atsuta Shrine]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=745426385 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20060614201723/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080429021401/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/intro/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/intro/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080426025815/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/pre/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/pre/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080504044812/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/tre/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/tre/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20090427132012/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/fes/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/fes/index.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20060614201723/http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp:80/eng/index.htm to http://www.atsutajingu.or.jp/eng/index.htm When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 02:04, 21 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:47, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q482065]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:22, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
